notes: SDI outputs support 3G (Level A and B), HD-SDI, and SD-SDI; grade set to sdi-3g (maximum). HDMI version not explicitly stated in specs; max resolution is 1080p60, consistent with HDMI 1.4 — grade inferred. The digital audio TRS jacks share the same physical connectors as the analog R-channel jacks (combined use, mode-selectable); labeled accordingly. AES/EBU digital audio carried on TRS-6.35 (unbalanced/balanced per Roland convention for this series). USB Type B is Hi-Speed USB (USB 2.0). Two SDI outputs are identical; the device can feed two SDI destinations simultaneously. Power is 9V DC via external adapter with DC barrel connector.

ports.name: AUDIO IN R / DIGITAL IN
ports.note: Balanced analog audio right channel or AES/EBU digital audio input — shared jack, selectable via menu

ports.name: AUDIO OUT R / DIGITAL OUT
ports.note: Balanced analog audio right channel or AES/EBU digital audio output — shared jack, selectable via menu

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Hi-Speed USB Type B; used for PC/Mac remote control via VC-1 RCS application

ports.name: DC IN
ports.note: 9V DC from included external AC adapter
